metadata.description: Sets Dynamics for Midi Items for Scoring Soundtracks.

version.author: A-intheCode
version.changelog: # 11.13 (2026-03-31) - gfx.init version number fix - Copy Paste Function was included. - (you can now copy and paste from one Midi Item to another - all markers will get copied and the curves will regenerated.) - The Help Description was changed and extended. - The Score Dynamics Tool can now be docked to the Reaper Windows and the State of the docking position will be stored ...
